chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 10 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 15.02.2018. Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w PI Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad -=-=- It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that alleged detenue Nayazay Mir Khan is admitted in hospital for treatment, and he is no more missing persons. Therefore, instant constitutional petition has become infructuousoi0, which is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
